title: Pyramid Texts, Utterance 96
description: Utterance 96 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.
introduction: Utterance 96 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.

translation.text: Pyramid Text Utterance 96: an ancient Egyptian funerary spell from the walls of the Pyramid of Unas at Saqqara (~2350 BCE). These are the oldest religious texts in the world. The spells empowered the deceased pharaoh's ascent to join the gods among the imperishable stars. Utterance 96 continues the great cycle of resurrection spells.
